report.summary: Audited DeSci and GambleFi guide pages for UX issues, created OG images for both, and implemented accessibility and interaction refinements across both pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added hover/focus states to Table of Contents links on both DeSci and GambleFi pages (color shift + indent animation)
Added aria-label and role='region' with tabIndex to all scrollable comparison tables (3 tables on DeSci, 3 tables on GambleFi) for screen reader accessibility
Added scope='col' to all table header cells for proper screen reader column association
Set minWidth on tables (500px/400px) to prevent text cramping on mobile scroll
Upgraded Related Guides sections from plain text links to card-style links with hover border highlight and lift animation on both pages
Changed Related Guides wrapper from div to nav element with aria-label for semantic navigation

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: desci-decentralized-science-guide-2026 (1200x630) — DNA helix + atom decorative icons, purple/green/cyan accent gradient, stats row showing 50+ projects, $60M+ funding, VitaDAO highlights
OG image: gamblefi-onchain-betting-guide-2026 (1200x630) — Dice + chart bars decorative icons, pink/purple/cyan accent gradient, stats row showing 17% iGaming share, $81B revenue, 42+ Azuro dApps

sections.title: Code Changes
items: DeSci page: Added CSS classes for toc-link hover states and related-card hover/lift animations via style tag
GambleFi page: Added matching CSS classes for toc-link and related-card interactions
Both pages: Table wrappers now have role='region', aria-label, and tabIndex={0} for keyboard-accessible horizontal scrolling
Both pages: Related guides section uses semantic nav element with card-based link styling
